    Method ToCmykIcc

    ToCmykIcc(Color)

    The conversion from Color to CMYKColor using icc conversion with default profiles. This method is deprecated. Please use more effective Aspose.Imaging.CmykColorHelper.ToCmykIcc(Aspose.CAD.Color).

    Declaration
    [Obsolete]
public static CmykColor ToCmykIcc(Color pixel)
    Parameters
    Type Name Description
    Color pixel

    The pixel of Color type in RGB format.
    Returns
    Type Description
    CmykColor

    The CmykColor.

    ToCmykIcc(Color[])

    The conversion from Color to CMYKColor using icc conversion with default profiles. This method is deprecated. Please use more effective Aspose.Imaging.CmykColorHelper.ToCmykIcc(Aspose.CAD.Color[]).

    Declaration
    [Obsolete]
public static CmykColor[] ToCmykIcc(Color[] pixels)
    Parameters
    Type Name Description
    Color[] pixels

    The pixels of Color type in RGB format.
    Returns
    Type Description
    CmykColor[]

    The Aspose:CAD:CmykColor[].

    ToCmykIcc(Color[], Stream, Stream)

    The conversion from Color to CMYKColor using icc conversion. This method is deprecated. Please use more effective Aspose.Imaging.CmykColorHelper.ToCmykIcc(Aspose.CAD.Color[],System.IO.Stream,System.IO.Stream).

    Declaration

public static CmykColor[] ToCmykIcc(Color[] pixels, Stream rgbIccStream, Stream cmykIccStream)

    Color[] pixels

    The pixels of Color type in RGB format.

    The conversion from Color to CMYKColor using icc conversion with default profiles. This method is deprecated. Please use more effective Aspose.Imaging.CmykColorHelper.ToCmykIcc(Aspose.CAD.Color,System.IO.Stream,System.IO.Stream).
